rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday August 21, 2015, line 1. Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees Continued to September 17, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 28, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANEESH GUPTA VS. BESS DAUBENMIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Aneesh Gupta To Compel The Depositions Of Defendants Ricky Lam And Jenny Huang; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Attorney Richard Beckman And Defendants Ricky Lam And Jenny Huang
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday August 21, 2015, line 2. Defendant's Motion to Compel Deposition Transferred to Department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on August 28, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MOLTHEN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AL-MASRI VS. TOPWELL INVESTMENT INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday August 21, 2015, line 3. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint Continued to September 23, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than August 28, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than August 28, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
